title: bauhinia seminarioi
intro: Bauhinia seminarioi, also known as the endemic Philippine orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, derived from its leaves, flowers, and seeds. The health benefits of Bauhinia seminarioi include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Bauhinia seminarioi can be found in traditional Filipino medicine, often used as a tea or infusion, and may also be available as supplements or extracts.
